free_text: After last year's cuts nobody believes the 'AI will help you' line
The tool is fine. The silence from leadership is not.
Training was a webinar. I need practice, not slides.
They monitor call times already. This will be more of that.
Give me the drafting tool, my inbox is drowning
We ran a shadow pilot already because approvals take forever
Works council asked questions we could not answer
Reconciliation agent would save my week if it is accurate
Fool me twice. The chatbot pilot in 2024 was abandoned without a word
Excited, but nobody has told us what is allowed
